title: Voices in the Dark
description: Inside the cult's meeting house, you learn the terrible truth.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The door opens.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: What is this place?

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: (whispering) This is the Clockmaker's Guild. Da used to take me here when I was little.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Shh! I hear voices. Hide!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You duck behind a pillar. Two robed figures walk down the corridor near you. They speak in hushed tones.

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: Does he have the device?

opening.speaker: Cultist_bookkeeper
opening.text: He refuses to cooperate. We found pieces of the device but he refuses to tell us how to use them. He claims the Temporal Resonance Device is incomplete.

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: He lies. It MUST be completed. We will force him if necessary.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: *whispers* They have him. They really have him.

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: We're moving him to the northern sanctuary tonight. There, he will have no choice but to finish the device.

opening.speaker: Cultist_bookkeeper
opening.text: And if he refuses?

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: Then we take what he has already built and find someone else to complete it. The device will reshape time itself.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The men continue walking. They don't see you. Your mind races.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: The Northern Sanctuary. We have to get there.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: But we don't know where it is.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Follow the moth!

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: The moth will travel as a moth travels... we need to go the old fashioned route.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: If only they had an old map lying around with a big red x on it, showing where the Sanctuary is...

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: You mean like that one over there?

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Over where?

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Rainie points to a small room filled with maps. The door is open.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: That works.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: there should be a map room and a mini puzzle that is map related here

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Once map puzzle is completed...

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Quick, let's grab the map.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: I can't condone theft.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: What if I promise to give it back as soon as we find Da?

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: That sounds more like illicit borrowing... which is acceptable.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: (worried) I think I hear someone coming!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Let's get out of here!

closing.speaker: Cultist 1
closing.text: Tomorrow, we move him to the northern sanctuary. There, he will have no choice but to finish the device.

closing.speaker: Cultist 1
closing.text: Then we take what he has already built and find someone else to complete it. The device will reshape time itself.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: The cultists leave. Alone in the dim church, your mind races.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Northern sanctuary. We have to get there first.

closing.speaker: Addie
closing.text: But we don't know where it is, Vera. We need to find a map, or someone who knows.

closing.speaker: Rainie
closing.text: Look! There's a door behind the altar. Maybe there are clues in there!

choices.text: Search carefully and quietly. Leave no trace that we were here.
Search quickly and take everything useful. They'll know someone was here, but we'll be long gone.

puzzle.title: Secrets in Shadow
puzzle.instructions: Gather useful items and organize them to find clues about the northern sanctuary.
